metadata.description: Jose Bezerra's personal Claude Code skills

plugins.name: clean-inbox
plugins.description: Cleans up the user's Gmail inbox by reading unread emails and marking unimportant ones as read

plugins.name: jira-ticket
plugins.description: Create or update Jira tickets using the Jira MCP, formatted as clean product-facing artifacts

plugins.name: spec
plugins.description: Turn a ticket/RFC into a reviewed plan via prd and Plan Mode, then execute it one task at a time with review before every commit
